creator: ports-archivemail@oldach.net
text:
Hi,

if I not mistaken you didn't apply the patch to pkg-plist. Wouldn't that
result in dangling manpages hanging around upon port removal?

Kind regards
Helge


miwi@FreeBSD.org wrote on Tue, 19 Feb 2013 17:18:15 +0100 (CET):
> Synopsis: [PATCH] ports/mail/archivemail: install manpage
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Tue Feb 19 16:18:14 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Committed. Thanks!
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=173697
>
